_note: PLACEHOLDER — Settings.json snippet for rhel-copywriter-skill hook and MCP registration. This is a design-phase stub. Values are illustrative only and must be validated against the target deployment environment before use.
_taxonomy_note: Taxonomy decision record TDR-RHCW-001 Section 5 notes that settings.json configuration is not required for v0.1 since the skill does not configure IDE-level settings. This snippet is provided as a placeholder for future tool-specific integration if needed.

mcpServers._note: No MCP server declarations required for v0.1. The skill is self-contained and uses only embedded standards files. Populate this block if a future version requires external data access (e.g. dynamic terminology fetch).

hooks._note: No hooks required for v0.1. The skill is invoked directly via the input brief schema. Populate this block if the skill needs pre/post-processing hooks in a specific IDE environment.

permissions._note: No special permissions required for v0.1. The skill reads embedded standards files only.

skillRegistration._enabled_note: Set to true once implementation sprint is complete and brand-tone-reference.md is approved.
